mapper.select: SELECT IDX, MENU_ID, TITLE, CONTENT, WRITER, TO_CHAR(REGDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') REGDATE, HIT FROM BOARD WHERE MENU_ID = #{ menu_id } ORDER BY IDX DESC
SELECT IDX, MENU_ID, TITLE, CONTENT, WRITER, TO_CHAR(REGDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') REGDATE, HIT FROM BOARD WHERE idx = #{ idx }
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO board ( IDX, MENU_ID, TITLE, CONTENT, WRITER ) VALUES ( (SELECT NVL(MAX(IDX),0)+1 FROM BOARD), #{menu_id}, #{title}, #{content}, #{writer} )
